subject: Fermi  trigger No 648278666: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs  <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V. Lipunov, E. Gorbovskoy, V.Kornilov, N.Tyurina, P.Balanutsa, A.Kuznetsov, F.Balakin,

(Irkutsk State University, API),

A. Tlatov, D. Dormidontov 
(Kislovodsk Solar Station of the Pulkovo Observatory),

V. Yurkov, A. Gabovich, Yu. Sergienko 
(Blagoveschensk Educational State University)




MASTER-Tavrida robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Russia (Lomonosov MSU, SAI Crimea astronomical station) started inspect of the Fermi GRB210718.23 (trigger No 648278666,19h 19m 55.92s , +19d 28m 58.8s, R=24.13) errorbox  55639 sec after notice time and 55731 sec after trigger time at 2021-07-18 20:53:13 UT, with upper limit up to  17.6 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 39 deg. The sun  altitude  is -23.8 deg. 

The galactic latitude b =  2 deg., longitude l = 54 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=1663373

We obtain a following upper limits.
